name: Keka HR API
description: REST API for the Keka HR and payroll platform covering employee records, attendance, leave, payroll, expense management, performance, recruitment, professional services automation, helpdesk, background verification, and rewards.

potentialAction.name: ManageLeave
potentialAction.description: Create and manage employee leave requests

potentialAction.name: ManageRecruitment
potentialAction.description: Manage job openings and candidates via Hire module

potentialAction.name: PerformanceManagement
potentialAction.description: Goals, appraisals, and feedback via PMS module

potentialAction.name: ExpenseManagement
potentialAction.description: Submit and track employee expense claims

potentialAction.name: AssetManagement
potentialAction.description: Track company assets assigned to employees

potentialAction.name: BackgroundVerification
potentialAction.description: Initiate and track employee background verification
